title: betula alnoides var. pyrifolia
intro: Betula alnoides var. pyrifolia, also known as the Chinese birch, is a deciduous tree species native to China, belonging to the birch family (Betulaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chinese birch include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, among others. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of decoctions or ointments to utilize its medicinal properties.
